source_jobs.title: Game Community & Content Lead
source_jobs.description:
About the role

At Viggle, we're exploring how AI can help people make games, and building a platform where indie devs build them and players come to play. You'll build and run the community around it, devs and players alike, grow the player base, and be the bridge back to our team.

What you'll do

 - Run our Discord and community: welcome people, keep them engaged, moderate, and run events (game jams, playtests, contests) that make them stay

 - Make a steady stream of content: clips, devlogs, dev spotlights, updates

 - Own the marketing for each game launch: plan it, build buzz, and get it in front of players

 - Gather feedback from devs and players and get it to our team in a form they can act on

What we're looking for

 - A real gamer who can break down why a game works

 - Has built and grown a community, ideally on Discord, from the early days

 - Plugged into indie gamedev communities and game jams, and gets how devs think and talk

 - Has marketed or launched a game, or knows what gets players to show up

 - Can make content solo, videos and posts people actually watch and read

 - AI-native in your own workflow

Bonus

 - Has shipped or built a game, even a small one

 - Runs a channel or audience of your own



What You'll Get

 - Competitive compensation

 - Hands-on experience inside a top-tier AI startup: learn how growth, community, and product work together at scale

 - Real ownership from day one. Your work ships, your ideas matter.

 - Access to cutting-edge AI video technology before anyone else

 - Complimentary lunch, dinner, snacks, and a vibrant office environment




ABOUT VIGGLE AI

Viggle AI is a startup backed by top-tier investors such as a16z and TSFV. At the forefront of the GenAI revolution, we specialize in controllable video generation for content creators, offering advanced technology that empowers creators to realize their visions. Our rapidly growing app is loved by creators from Hollywood professionals to TikTokers, boasting over 45 million users and hosting the second-largest Discord community worldwide.

source_jobs.title: Growth & Community Intern
source_jobs.description:
About Viggle AI

Backed by a16z, Viggle AI is building the world's most advanced controllable video and 3D generation technology, empowering game developers, content creators, filmmakers, and industry professionals to bring their visions to life. From building characters to building worlds, Viggle has reached over 40 million users worldwide with a small but mighty team.

About the Role

We're looking for a Community Intern who's AI-native, chronically online, and ready to get their hands dirty. You'll join one of the sharpest growth teams in the game and directly contribute to how Viggle shows up across social and creator channels.

What You'll Do

 - Contribute to social media content production, including filming and editing video content for Viggle's channels

 - Discover and track trends across TikTok, Instagram, X, and YouTube; study what's working in our user community and turn insights into templates that help creators make great Viggle content

 - Lead creator and influencer outreach: identify, reach out to, and build relationships with creators who align with our brand

What We're Looking For

 - Chronically online: you understand what's viral right now and why

 - AI-native: hands-on experience with AI video/image generation tools (Runway, Kling, Midjourney, Viggle, etc.)

 - Can edit video, comfortable in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar

 - Strong content instincts: you've made things people actually engaged with

 - Excellent written communication for creator DMs, captions, and community posts

 - Detail-oriented and execution-driven. We value people who ship, not just people who pitch. Ideas are great; output is better.

What You'll Get

 - Competitive compensation

 - Hands-on experience inside a top-tier AI startup: learn how growth, community, and product work together at scale

 - Real ownership from day one. Your work ships, your ideas matter.

 - Access to cutting-edge AI video technology before anyone else

 - Complimentary lunch, dinner, snacks, and a vibrant office environment

source_jobs.title: Video Content Creator, 3D Animation
source_jobs.description:
About Viggle AI

Backed by a16z, Viggle AI is building the world's most advanced controllable video and 3D generation technology, empowering game developers, content creators, filmmakers, and industry professionals to bring their visions to life. From building characters to building worlds, Viggle has reached over 45 million users worldwide with a small but mighty team.



About PINOC

PINOC is Viggle's studio for generative 3D: a faster way for creators and game devs to produce 3D assets and bring them straight into their existing pipeline. We want a creator who lives on camera and online, makes videos that show what PINOC can do, teaches people to use it, and grows a real audience of creators and game devs around it.

You'll be the one making videos of: tutorials, demos, 3D animation showcases, and the "how did you make that" videos that show PINOC at its best.


What you'll do

 - Make videos end to end: Tutorials, demos, 3D showcase pieces on YouTube and social

 - Grow PINOC's audience and reputation on social, mainly YouTube, and across 3D / game dev communities

 - Run workshops and Q&As in our community to help creators get unstuck

 - Bring back what creators ask for and struggle with, so the team can improve the product

What we're looking for

 - A creator who ships content solo, idea to published video

 - Natural on camera and a clear explainer who can show creators how PINOC fits into the way they already work

 - Hands-on with 3D: comfortable in tools like Blender, Maya, Unreal, or Unity

 - Fluent with AI creative tools in your daily workflow

Bonus Points

 - Has built or shipped a game. A real gamer who knows the platforms and the culture

 - Already runs a YouTube or creator channel with an audience

 - Active in 3D, animation, or game dev communities on reddit or discord



What You'll Get

 - Competitive compensation

 - Hands-on experience inside a top-tier AI startup: learn how growth, community, and product work together at scale

 - Real ownership from day one. Your work ships, your ideas matter.

 - Access to cutting-edge AI video technology before anyone else

 - Complimentary lunch, dinner, snacks, and a vibrant office environment

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US:

Viggle AI is a leading generative AI startup backed by top-tier investors, including Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) and Two Small Fish Ventures (TSFV). We are building AI-powered creation tools that enable anyone to create, animate, and interact with digital characters. Our platform combines generative AI, 3D technology, and real-time experiences to help creators bring their ideas to life. Today, Viggle is used by more than 45 million users worldwide, from professional creators and digital artists to everyday content creators, and is supported by one of the world's largest creator communities.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Design Engineer who combines strong product design fundamentals with a passion for rapid prototyping and AI-native product development.

You'll own end-to-end product experiences across web, mobile, and creator tools, working closely with Product, Engineering, and AI teams to design intuitive, engaging experiences powered by cutting-edge technology. From concept to launch, you'll help shape the future of AI-driven content creation through thoughtful design, rapid experimentation, and close collaboration. This is a high-impact role with significant ownership and the opportunity to influence both product direction and user experience at scale.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Lead product design across web, mobile, and creator-facing tools—from discovery and concept development through polished execution and launch.

 - Design intuitive AI-powered workflows, character creation experiences, and social features that make advanced technology accessible and enjoyable for millions of users.

 - Craft elegant interfaces, thoughtful interactions, and scalable design systems that delight creators and drive engagement.

 - Leverage AI tools, no-code platforms, and modern development workflows to build interactive prototypes, test concepts, and accelerate product decisions.

 - Partner closely with Product, Engineering, AI Research, and Growth teams to define product strategy and bring ambitious ideas to life.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


CORE QUALIFICATIONS

 - 3+ years of experience designing consumer-facing digital products

 - Strong portfolio demonstrating product thinking, visual design, interaction design, and systems thinking

 - Experience designing for both web and mobile platforms

 - Proven ability to take products from early concepts to production-ready experiences

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills in cross-functional environments

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, iterative startup environment


AI-NATIVE MINDSET

 - You actively leverage AI tools to enhance creativity, productivity, and product development.

 - Experience with tools such as Cursor, Claude Code, v0, Lovable, Bolt, Figma AI, or similar AI-assisted workflows is highly valued.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience designing AI products, creative tools, creator platforms, gaming products, or social applications

 - Familiarity with ecosystems such as Roblox, Fortnite Creative, Unity, Unreal Engine, or Blender

 - Experience building products for creators, online communities, or digital entertainment audiences

 - Front-end development experience with React, Next.js, or similar technologies

 - Experience working across international markets and user communities
   
   


WHY JOIN US

 - Help define the future of AI-powered creation and digital entertainment

 - Work at the intersection of AI, creativity, and immersive technology

 - Build products used by creators around the world

 - High ownership, fast decision-making, and direct influence on product direction

 - Collaborate with a talented, ambitious team pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI
   
   


BENEFITS:

 - 🚀 Dynamic startup culture—accelerate your skills and career growth

 - 📈 Attractive equity packages and highly competitive salary

 - 🩺 Comprehensive dental coverage

 - 🍽️ Complimentary lunch, dinner, snacks, and a vibrant, fun offic

source_jobs.title: Finance and Operation Manager
source_jobs.description:
The Role

We're hiring an Finance & Operation Manager to be the operational backbone of Viggle’s Toronto office and a force multiplier for leadership.

This is not a traditional EA role. We're looking for someone who is sharp, analytical, and commercially minded, and someone who can run the office, support executive workflows, assist with finance and administrative operations, and plug into business development and cross-functional projects when needed. You'll be a key part of how Viggle functions day-to-day and a trusted extension of the leadership team.

If you thrive in fast-moving environments, hate wasted motion, and want to be close to the action at a company building something that matters, this is the role.

Responsibilities

Office Operations

 - Own the day-to-day operations of the Toronto office—including vendor relationships, office supplies, facilities, and everything that keeps the office running smoothly.

 - Set up and maintain systems and processes that make the office efficient, organized, and professional.

 - Coordinate company events, offsites, team meetings, and visitor logistics.

 - Be the go-to person for all operational matters in Toronto.

Finance & Administrative Operations

 - Support day-to-day finance and administrative operations, including expense management, invoice processing, vendor payments, and budget tracking.

 - Assist with bookkeeping and accounting processes using QuickBooks Online (QBO) and work closely with external accountants and tax advisors.

 - Support government funding and tax credit programs, including assisting with SR&ED documentation and information gathering.

 - Help coordinate month-end administrative activities and maintain accurate operational and financial records.

 - Continuously identify opportunities to improve internal operational and financial processes.

Executive Support

 - Manage calendars, travel, and logistics for leadership with precision and proactivity.

 - Prepare materials, briefings, and research ahead of key meetings and decisions.

 - Own follow-through on action items—track what was decided, what's due, and what's slipping.

Handle sensitive information and communications with discretion and sound judgment



Who You Are

Required Experience

 - Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Accounting, Finance, Commerce, or a related field.

 - 3+ years of experience in an Executive Assistant, Operations, Office Manager, Chief of Staff, or other cross-functional role within a fast-paced company.

 - Demonstrated ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously without dropping the ball.

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills—clear, concise, and professional.

 - Comfortable working with data, metrics, and analytical tasks—not just administrative logistics.

 - Experience directly supporting senior executives or founders.

Strong Signals

 - Previous experience at a startup, technology company, or other high-growth environment.

 - Background in Business, Finance, Accounting, Operations, or a related field.

 - Experience supporting finance or business operations.

 - Familiarity with QuickBooks Online (QBO) or other cloud-based accounting systems.

 - Familiarity with Canadian government funding programs, including SR&ED tax credits, is an asset.

 - Exposure to business development, sales operations, or commercial workflows.

 - Experience building or improving internal processes rather than simply maintaining them.

 - Proficiency with tools such as Notion, Slack, Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, and CRM platforms.

 - Experience serving as an office lead, operations lead, or Chief of Staff.

You Are

 - A natural executor—you identify what needs to be done and make it happen.

 - Analytical—you bring structure and data-driven thinking to ambiguous problems.

 - Highly organized without being rigid—you adapt quickly as priorities change.

 - Discreet, trustworthy, and professional when handling confidential information.

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff - Backend Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
"Learning fast is an engineer’s superpower in the AI era."




ABOUT US:

Viggle AI is a startup backed by top-tier investors such as a16z and TSFV. At the forefront of the GenAI revolution, we specialize in controllable video generation for content creators, offering advanced technology that empowers creators to realize their visions. Our rapidly growing app is loved by creators from Hollywood professionals to TikTokers, boasting over 45 million users and hosting the second-largest Discord community worldwide.





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


ABOUT THE ROLE

Viggle is building the next generation of AI-powered avatar and video generation. We're hiring a backend engineer to own and evolve our core platform — a Go-based business API serving millions of creators, and a distributed Python GPU pipeline that turns reference images and driving videos into high-quality avatar renders at scale.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Architect and maintain highly scalable, distributed backend systems powering Viggle's global AI video generation platform across web and mobile clients

 - Design and implement APIs that power video generation, character/asset management, the creator platform, and monetization (subscriptions, IAP, Stripe)

 - Develop robust processing pipelines for ingesting user-uploaded videos and orchestrating GPU-heavy workloads (encoding, inpainting, rendering) in near real-time

 - Productionize ML models from research to scale with our ML team, drive the technical vision for reliability, throughput, and cost efficiency across our GPU fleet — fast-fail coordination, resource reservation, credit safety, GPU utilization


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 3 years of professional backend engineering experience

 - Excellent proficiency in Go OR Python, with a strong ability and willingness to ramp up on the other — we don't expect day-one fluency in both. Our stack is Go (Gin, GORM) for business APIs and Python (FastAPI, asyncio, aiohttp) for GPU workers.

 - Experience designing and operating distributed systems at scale — worker coordination, queue-based pipelines, resource reservation, fault recovery

 - Familiarity with message queues and event-driven architectures (Redis, RabbitMQ, Temporal, NATS, Kafka, or similar)

 - Working knowledge of containerization and orchestration — Docker, Kubernetes, and modern CI/CD practices


BONUS POINTS

 - Experience operating GPU inference services in production (PyTorch / TensorRT / Triton) — model loading, warmup, CUDA memory management, OOM debugging

 - Familiarity with video processing toolchains (FFmpeg, OpenCV, fMP4 / HLS streaming, PTS/timestamp handling)

 - Background in workflow orchestration (Temporal, Airflow) or stream processing
   
   


BENEFITS:

 - 🚀 Dynamic startup culture—accelerate your skills and career growth

 - 📈 Attractive equity packages and highly competitive salary

 - 🩺 Comprehensive dental coverage

 - 🍽️ Complimentary lunch, dinner, snacks, and a vibrant, fun office environment

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (intern/co-op)
source_jobs.description:
"Learning fast is an engineer’s superpower in the AI era."

About Us

Viggle AI is a startup backed by top-tier investors such as a16z and TSFV. We're at the forefront of the GenAI revolution, building the foundation model for the world — and the products that put it in everyone's hands, from first-time meme makers to professional studios.

The result is one of the most loved creative platforms in AI: over 45 million users, one of the largest communities on Discord, and creators spanning Hollywood professionals to TikTokers. Behind it is a Toronto-based team that lives by one principle — serious tech, silly fun.

About the job

"Learning fast is an engineer's superpower in the AI era."

At Viggle, you won't be boxed into a role label. We hire for engineering judgment and the ability to learn fast — across our App, PINOC, Games, API, and the infrastructure behind them, the same person might touch a generation pipeline, a real-time rendering path, and the product surface a creator actually sees. As an intern or co-op, you'll own real work that ships, not side projects.

What We're Looking For

Tell us what you love building, and we'll find the surface that fits. Here's where you'd likely land:

🎬 Viggle App — Consumer, mobile & web The product 40M+ creators actually touch — fast generation flows and real-time editing. You: React Native or React/Next.js + TypeScript, with a love for performance and polish.

🦴 PINOC — AI motion capture & 3D pipeline Turn any footage into skeletal animation, exported to FBX/GLB for real 3D pipelines. You: 3D graphics (Three.js/WebGL), rigging/retargeting, pose estimation/CV, glTF/FBX, Python.

🎮 Viggle Games — Real-time interactive 3D Playable, multiplayer experiences built on generative 3D, like Fight Anyone 3D. You: game engines (Unity/Unreal) or WebGL, multiplayer netcode, react, node.

⚙️ Viggle API — Developer platform & inference infra The platform other developers and AI agents build on — any motion in one call. You: Go, Python, backend/distributed systems, inference serving & GPU orchestration, API design, Go/Python/Rust.

🛠️ Infrastructure & ML Systems — Training, inference & data The backbone behind every model — training, inference, and the data they learn from. You: ML infra/MLOps, model optimization, distributed training & GPU orchestration (CUDA/PyTorch/Ray), data pipelines.

Not sure which track? That's fine — strong fundamentals of travel, and our engineers move across these areas as projects demand. Just tell us what you're best at and what you want to learn next.

notes: AI-focused startup with a strong engineering core, posting a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
